CustomField.formula:
IF(ISBLANK(Agent_2_Appointment__c), "", CASE(MOD(DATEVALUE(Agent_2_Appointment__c) - DATE(1900, 1, 7), 7), 0, "Sunday", 1, "Monday", 2, "Tuesday", 3, "Wednesday", 4, "Thursday", 5, "Friday", 6, "Saturday", "") & "
" & TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(Agent_2_Appointment__c))) & CASE(MOD(DAY(DATEVALUE(Agent_2_Appointment__c)), 10), 1, IF(DAY(DATEVALUE(Agent_2_Appointment__c)) = 11, "th", "st"), 2, IF(DAY(DATEVALUE(Agent_2_Appointment__c)) = 12, "th", "nd"), 3, IF(DAY(DATEVALUE(Agent_2_Appointment__c)) = 13, "th", "rd"), "th") & " " & CASE(MONTH(DATEVALUE(Agent_2_Appointment__c)), 1, "January", 2, "February", 3, "March", 4, "April", 5, "May", 6, "June", 7, "July", 8, "August", 9, "September", 10, "October", 11, "November", 12, "December", "") & " " & TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(Agent_2_Appointment__c))) & "
" & IF(VALUE(MID(TEXT(Agent_2_Appointment__c), 12, 2)) = 0, "12", IF(VALUE(MID(TEXT(Agent_2_Appointment__c), 12, 2)) > 12, TEXT(VALUE(MID(TEXT(Agent_2_Appointment__c), 12, 2)) - 12), MID(TEXT(Agent_2_Appointment__c), 12, 2))) & ":" & MID(TEXT(Agent_2_Appointment__c), 15, 2) & IF(VALUE(MID(TEXT(Agent_2_Appointment__c), 12, 2)) >= 12, " pm", " am") )
CustomField.label: Agent 2 Appointment (HTML)
